Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Class DefaultJavaRequirements

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.DefaultJavaRequirements
All Implemented Interfaces:
Configuration, JavaRequirements
public final class DefaultJavaRequirements extends Object implements JavaRequirements
Default implementation of JavaRequirements.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DefaultJavaRequirements()
    Equivalent to DefaultJavaRequirements(MainApplicationScope.INSTANCE).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    assertionsAreEnabled()
    Indicates if assertThat() will verify requirements; otherwise, it won't do anything.
    JavaRequirements
    copy()
    Returns a copy of this configuration.
    Map<String,Object>
    getContext()
    Returns an unmodifiable map to append to the exception message.
    String
    getContextMessage(String message)
    Returns the contextual information associated with this configuration.
    boolean
    isCleanStackTrace()
    Indicates if stack trace references to this library should be removed, so long as it does not result in any user code being removed.
    boolean
    isDiffEnabled()
    Indicates if exceptions should show the difference between the actual and expected values.

    Indicates that assertThat() shouldn't do anything.

    Adds or updates contextual information associated with the exception message.

    Indicates that exceptions should show the difference between the actual and expected values.

    withoutAnyContext()
    Removes all contextual information associated with the exception message.

  • Constructor Details

    • DefaultJavaRequirements

      public DefaultJavaRequirements()
      Equivalent to DefaultJavaRequirements(MainApplicationScope.INSTANCE).

  • Method Details

    • copy

      public JavaRequirements copy()
      Description copied from interface: Configuration
      Returns a copy of this configuration. This method is thread-safe. Other methods may not be.
      Specified by:
      copy in interface Configuration
      Specified by:
      copy in interface JavaRequirements
      Returns:
      a copy of this configuration

    • assertionsAreEnabled

      public boolean assertionsAreEnabled()
      Description copied from interface: Configuration
      Indicates if assertThat() will verify requirements; otherwise, it won't do anything.
      Specified by:
      assertionsAreEnabled in interface Configuration
      Returns:
      true if assertions are enabled for this class

    • isCleanStackTrace

      public boolean isCleanStackTrace()
      Description copied from interface: Configuration
      Indicates if stack trace references to this library should be removed, so long as it does not result in any user code being removed.
      Specified by:
      isCleanStackTrace in interface Configuration
      Returns:
      true by default
      See Also:
      • Configuration.withCleanStackTrace()
      • Configuration.withoutCleanStackTrace()

    • withCleanStackTrace

      public JavaRequirements withCleanStackTrace()
      Description copied from interface: Configuration
      Indicates that stack trace references to this library should be removed, so long as it does not result in any user code being removed.
      Specified by:
      withCleanStackTrace in interface Configuration
      Specified by:
      withCleanStackTrace in interface JavaRequirements
      Returns:
      this
      See Also:
      • Configuration.isCleanStackTrace()

    • withoutCleanStackTrace

      public JavaRequirements withoutCleanStackTrace()
      Description copied from interface: Configuration
      Indicates that stack trace references to this library should be kept.
      Specified by:
      withoutCleanStackTrace in interface Configuration
      Specified by:
      withoutCleanStackTrace in interface JavaRequirements
      Returns:
      this
      See Also:
      • Configuration.isCleanStackTrace()

    • getContext

      public Map<String,Object> getContext()
      Description copied from interface: Configuration
      Returns an unmodifiable map to append to the exception message.
      Specified by:
      getContext in interface Configuration
      Returns:
      an empty map by default
      See Also:
      • Configuration.withContext(String, Object)

    • withContext

      public JavaRequirements withContext(String name, Object value)
      Description copied from interface: Configuration
      Adds or updates contextual information associated with the exception message. Overrides any values associated with the name at the ThreadRequirements level.
      Specified by:
      withContext in interface Configuration
      Specified by:
      withContext in interface JavaRequirements
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the parameter
      value - the value of the parameter
      Returns:
      this

    • withoutContext

      public JavaRequirements withoutContext(String name)
      Description copied from interface: Configuration
      Removes contextual information associated with the exception message.
      Specified by:
      withoutContext in interface Configuration
      Specified by:
      withoutContext in interface JavaRequirements
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the parameter
      Returns:
      this

    • withoutAnyContext

      public JavaRequirements withoutAnyContext()
      Description copied from interface: Configuration
      Removes all contextual information associated with the exception message.
      Specified by:
      withoutAnyContext in interface Configuration
      Specified by:
      withoutAnyContext in interface JavaRequirements
      Returns:
      this

      public String getContextMessage(String message)
      Description copied from interface: JavaRequirements
      Returns the contextual information associated with this configuration.
      Specified by:
      getContextMessage in interface JavaRequirements
      Parameters:
      message - the exception message (null if absent)
      Returns:
      the contextual information associated with this configuration

      Indicates if exceptions should show the difference between the actual and expected values.

      Returns:

    • toString

      public String toString(Object value)
      Description copied from interface: Configuration
      Returns the String representation of an object. By default, custom handlers are provided for arrays, Integer, Long, BigDecimal, List, Set, Map, Path, and Throwable.
      Specified by:
      toString in interface Configuration
      Parameters:
      value - a value
      Returns:
      the String representation of the value
      See Also:
      • Configuration.withStringConverter(Class, Function)

    • withStringConverter

      public <T> JavaRequirements withStringConverter(Class<T> type, Function<T,String> converter)
      Description copied from interface: Configuration
      Indicates that a function should be used to convert an object to a String.

      Please note that type must be an exact match (e.g. configuring a converter for Set will not match values of type HashSet).

      Specified by:
      withStringConverter in interface Configuration
      Specified by:
      withStringConverter in interface JavaRequirements
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of object being converted
      Parameters:
      type - the type of object being converted (non-primitive arrays are mapped to Object[].class)
      converter - a function that converts an object of the specified type to a String
      Returns:
      this

    • withoutStringConverter

      public <T> JavaRequirements withoutStringConverter(Class<T> type)
      Description copied from interface: Configuration
      Indicates that an object's toString() method should be used to convert it to a String.
      Specified by:
      withoutStringConverter in interface Configuration
      Specified by:
      withoutStringConverter in interface JavaRequirements
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of object being converted
      Parameters:
      type - the type of object being converted
      Returns:
      this

      public JavaRequirements withConfiguration(Configuration configuration)

      Replaces the configuration.
      Specified by:
      withConfiguration in interface Configuration
      Specified by:
      withConfiguration in interface JavaRequirements
      Parameters:
      configuration - a new configuration
      Returns:
      this

      public <T> ObjectVerifier<T> requireThat(T actual, String name)
      Description copied from interface: JavaRequirements
      Verifies the requirements of an Object.
      Specified by:
      requireThat in interface JavaRequirements
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the value
      Parameters:
      actual - the actual value
      name - the name of the value
      Returns:
      a verifier for the value
